author: Disney YouTube
text:
Moana | Catherine is Moana | In Theaters July 10
“She was unafraid, she was fearless”

Go behind the scenes with Dwayne Johnson, Tommy Kail, and Auliʻi Cravalho on finding Catherine Lagaʻaia, our new live-action Moana.
